text: Before ePMC, cost reports were two weeks behind. Now our director reviews live numbers every morning. Caught a ₹18 lakh variation before dispute. This transformed our financial control and reduced month-end reconciliation effort by 70%. The real-time dashboard helped us avoid a major cost overrun.
name: Senior Project Manager
title: Infrastructure Developer, Pune

text: Real-time material inventory reduced procurement delays by 60%. Full transparency across 5 active sites. We now avoid stockouts and reduce wastage by tracking consumption live. The system paid for itself in the first quarter.
name: Project Director
title: Shripad Construction, Mumbai

text: Progress monitoring improved decision speed dramatically. Zero surprises at handover — a game changer for our board reviews. The daily site updates eliminated confusion. Highly recommended.
name: Construction Head
